assertions.assertion: Output defines a client with ClientId 'batch-processor' using GrantTypes.ClientCredentials with AllowedScopes containing 'orders.read' and 'inventory.write'
Output defines a client with ClientId 'admin-portal' using GrantTypes.Code with RequirePkce true (explicit or by noting default)
assertions.rationale: Client 'admin-portal' uses `GrantTypes.Code`. RequirePkce is not explicitly set but the prose notes 'which should be enabled by default', which counts as noting the default.

assertions.assertion: The admin-portal client has AllowOfflineAccess set to true to enable refresh tokens
The admin-portal client includes IdentityServerConstants.StandardScopes.OpenId (or 'openid') in its AllowedScopes
assertions.rationale: AllowedScopes contains 'openid' as a string literal.

assertions.assertion: The admin-portal client has RedirectUris containing 'https://admin.example.com/signin-oidc' and PostLogoutRedirectUris containing 'https://admin.example.com/signout-callback-oidc'
